personal.name: Nehal Ahmed K
personal.title: Google Ads Specialist & Coach
personal.subtitle: Google Certified Ads Specialist and Coach with 7+ years of hands on experience scaling businesses through Google Ads. I help marketers and owners master performance marketing.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I am Nehal Ahmed K, a certified Google Ads specialist and PPC coach. Over the past 7 years, I have worked hands-on to help businesses transform ad spend into predictable, profitable revenue models. My specialty is developing high-ROI Shopping and Performance Max campaigns, plus tightening tracking setups.

Beyond campaign management, I believe in empowering the marketing community. Through my coaching programs and educational video content, I have helped thousands of students master performance ads and build stable customer acquisition channels.
about.bioTitle: I help brands scale their revenue through performance marketing.
bioParagraphs: I am Nehal Ahmed K, a certified Google Ads specialist and PPC coach. Over the past 7 years, I have worked hands-on to help businesses transform ad spend into predictable, profitable revenue models. My specialty is developing high-ROI Shopping and Performance Max campaigns, plus tightening tracking setups.

Beyond campaign management, I believe in empowering the marketing community. Through my coaching programs and educational video content, I have helped thousands of students master performance ads and build stable customer acquisition channels.

corePillars.title: Data-Driven Strategy
corePillars.desc: I believe in absolute tracking precision. Before scaling spend, I build clean Google Tag Manager setups to attribute every single conversion accurately.

corePillars.title: Revenue Over Clicks
corePillars.desc: Traffic is vanity, revenue is sanity. I optimize bidding models and keyword matches toward target ROAS and cost-per-acquisition, not click volumes.

corePillars.title: Continuous Iteration
corePillars.desc: Campaign success is built on testing. I run structured A/B tests on landing page creatives, ad copies, and match types to stay ahead of search behaviors.

corePillars.title: Complete Transparency
corePillars.desc: No hidden dashboards or vague metrics. Clients receive clear reports showing exactly how search ad spend translates to bottom-line business revenue.

timeline.title: The Launchpad
description: Started working in search engine marketing (SEM), mastering keyword bidding strategies and lead generation setups.

timeline.title: E-commerce Scaling
description: Shifted focus towards scaling physical products, successfully running multi-channel performance marketing campaigns for brands in the US and Europe.

timeline.title: Coaching & Community
description: Launched a dedicated PPC training program and YouTube channel, helping thousands of marketers learn performance ads (gaining 300K+ views).

timeline.title: Managing Global Accounts
description: Overseeing Google Ads setups for high-performing lead generation and e-commerce companies across Dubai, the UK, and the USA.

certifications.title: Google Ads Search Certification
certifications.description: Validation of expertise in creating, managing, measuring, and optimizing Google Search campaigns.

footer.title: FIND ME ON

faqs.a: I have managed campaigns across lead generation and e-commerce in the USA, UK, and Dubai, focusing on high converting, ROI driven Google Ads strategies. Reach out and I will share a tailored plan for your business.
